_note: v0.3 Item 8 (narrow): dom_binding::type_for now covers bind:checked (HTMLInputElement['checked']) and bind:files (HTMLInputElement['files']) — the two bidirectional bindings whose target type is independent of the input's `type` attribute. bind:value and bind:group are deferred: their type varies with `type='number'` / `type='file'` / etc., needing attribute-aware element-type dispatch. Row/column are 0-based.
